previousAuditComparison.description: Explanation of what this section represents — comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Explanation of what this section represents — auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleObservation: Observed strong adherence to cash handling procedures and good branch security protocols.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Recommend implementing a digital signature system for all high-value transactions to improve security.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleObservation: Previous audit noted some discrepancies in daily cash reconciliation processes and ledger entries.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleRecommendation: Previous audit recommended daily dual-control verification for all cash balances and transactions.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Explanation of what this section represents — final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
